ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "acct_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "statement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of account statements (e.g., monthly) */,
  "account_district" TEXT /* District where the account is registered */,
  "num_customers" INTEGER /* Number of customers associated with the account */,
  "credit_cards" INTEGER /* Reference to the number of credit cards linked to the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, closed, suspended) */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction or activity */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the account */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was issued */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "loan_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Loan duration in months */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "loan_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the loan is in default */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Late payment fee for the loan */,
  "next_payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "total_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid on the loan so far */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance on the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "trans_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "trans_amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., groceries, utilities) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the transaction is in a different currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for balance records */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "max_balance" REAL /* Maximum balance recorded for the account */,
  "min_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance recorded for the account */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the balance was last updated */,
  "average_balance" REAL /* Average balance over a certain period */,
  "annual_interest_earned" REAL /* Annual interest earned on the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "max_withdrawal" REAL /* Maximum withdrawal amount allowed */,
  "min_withdrawal" REAL /* Minimum withdrawal amount allowed */,
  "last_withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of the last withdrawal */,
  "withdrawal_count" INTEGER /* Total number of withdrawals made */,
  "withdrawal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of withdrawals (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_transactions" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit transaction record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit transaction (e.g., bank transfer, cash) */,
  "credit_txn_ct" INTEGER /* Count of transactions of this type */,
  "credit_txn_tot" REAL /* Total amount of credit transactions */,
  "avg_txn" REAL /* Average amount per credit transaction */,
  "last_credit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last credit transaction */,
  "credit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of credit transactions (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "max_credit_amount" REAL /* Maximum credit amount in a single transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debit_transactions" (
  "debit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debit transaction record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "debit_type" TEXT /* Type of debit transaction (e.g., household payment, insurance) */,
  "debit_txn_ct" INTEGER /* Count of transactions of this type */,
  "debit_txn_tot" REAL /* Total amount of debit transactions */,
  "avg_txn" REAL /* Average amount per debit transaction */,
  "last_debit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last debit transaction */,
  "debit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of debit transactions (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "max_debit_amount" REAL /* Maximum debit amount in a single transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debit_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "owner_client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "owner_district" TEXT /* District where the user resides */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the user */,
  "account_opened_by" TEXT /* Name of the bank employee who opened the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed report data in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the bank employee who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., account creation, transaction) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("owner_client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
